generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people support alliances, but have we really thought about the costs? Our tax dollars are going to maintain bases overseas while our own infrastructure crumbles. And for what? The last real crisis was decades ago. We need to focus on securing our own borders and communities first. #Priorities #NationalSecurity
